testcase.name: test_fase3_1_failure_group_block_and_alternate

failure.message: AssertionError: Internal Server Error assert 500 in (200, 201) + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_regression_endpoints[/dashboard/kpis-admin-200]

failure.message: AssertionError: /dashboard/kpis -> 500 Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pcm_phases.py:309: in test_regression_endpoints assert r.status_code == expected, f"{path} -> {r.status_code} {r.text[:200]}" E AssertionError: /dashboard/kpis -> 500 Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
